Ready for the real fight?

Attack but make sure to heal before your health runs out!

Welcome! Today is your first day as a Magetender.

A Magetender specializes in crafting perfect brews to enhance their customers' moods. Follow along with your very first patron and you'll do great!

< Press SPACE to continue >
Let's head over to your brewing station..
This Mood Graph helps you understand your customer's needs! The target shows where they want their mood to be.
Let's start by choosing a base to guide our brew to the right mood. As we can see, Gurt wants to feel calmer. Let's go with Moonshine!
Next up, ingredients! You can see which moods an ingredient influences by hovering over it. Let's give this frog a wishbone!
For the final touch, let's add a topping! Topping preferences depend on the type of creature you're serving. This slimy toad gets a lime!
Excellent! Now it's time to serve...
Congratulations! You've made the perfect brew for Gurt!
Not so fast! It won't always be this easy to please your customers..
